creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pi
Date: Sun Aug 18 10:50:14 UTC 2019
New revision: 509200
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/509200

Log:
  New port: net/tsctp

  TSCTP is an SCTP test tool. Its purpose is to perform basic SCTP
  functionality tests to check implementations interoperability and
  to verify that the SCTP stack is working.

  WWW: https://www.uni-due.de/~be0001/tsctp/

  PR:		239846
  Submitted by:	dreibh@iem.uni-due.de

Changes:
  head/net/Makefile
  head/net/tsctp/
  head/net/tsctp/Makefile
  head/net/tsctp/distinfo
  head/net/tsctp/pkg-descr
